name: AI Gateway and Provider Orchestration Unit

validate.v1: toolPolicy must include generate-outline and append-slide-markdown when outline generation is requested
validate.v2: pages/slides are clamped to configured runtime limits
validate.v3: provider responses normalize to valid JSON-backed typed artifacts where required

constraints: Provider dispatch supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mock fallback
Route layer wraps AI failures as 502 responses
description: Coordinates AI route intents with provider-specific generation, normalization, and slide composition outputs.
